ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic gross revenue of the movie */,
  "foreign_gross" REAL /* Foreign gross revenue of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "mpaa_rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating (e.g., PG, R, NC-17) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis or plot summary of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the studio headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the studio's logo image */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the studio's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or about me section for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_countries" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross revenue in the specific country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the favorite movie */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "movie_id")
)
